subject.title: English A Lang & Lit
subject.description:
**IB English A Language & Literature** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **the study of language and literature through a wide variety of texts and media from different periods, styles, and cultures**, with a strong focus on **critical analysis of both literary and non-literary texts, examining how language choices create meaning and effect in different contexts**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Text analysis | 1h 15m | 2h 15m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL) |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay | 1h 45m | 1h 45m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL)  |
| **HL Essay** | Written assignment | N/A | 1200-1500 words | 25% (HL only) |
| **Individual Oral** | Oral presentation | 15 minutes | 15 minutes | 30% (SL), 20% (HL) |

strengths: Clear and effective communication of topic and research question
Logical signposting through section headings maintains reader orientation
Generally complete methodology using a wide range of relevant sources
weaknesses: Lacks an explicit methodology section detailing rationale for source selection and analytic procedures
Occasional digressions into plot summary dilute focus
Introduction could more directly tie opening reflections to the research question
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission demonstrates clear purpose and focus, with a sharply stated research question and effective topic communication (strands at the top of the 3â4 band). However, the absence of an explicit methodology section and minor digressions into summary prevent placement at the very top of the 5â6 band. A score of 4 appropriately reflects consistent clarity tempered by methodological opacity and occasional off-topic asides.

strengths: Excellent deployment of diverse primary and secondary sources showing deep understanding of both texts
Accurate and consistent use of advanced subject-specific terminology
Nuanced engagement with scholarly commentary to support key claims
weaknesses: Occasional over-length quotations interrupt the flow of original analysis
Sporadic mechanical slips in terminology and a few under-elaborated terms (e.g., âautistic twinâ)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Knowledge of the topic is excellent, with coherent integration of sources and precise vocabulary (bands 5â6). Minor mechanical errors and some uneven synthesis keep the work short of perfection but well into the upper band. A score of 5 reflects this strong, though slightly uneven, performance.

strengths: Good breadth of research consistently relevant to the guiding question
Insightful close readings that often link back to key themes (e.g., lunar imagery, trauma layers)
Coherent development of argument sections with generally supported conclusions
weaknesses: Extended quotations sometimes go uncommented, weakening authorial voice
Evaluation is intermittently restative rather than critically synthetic, and counter-arguments are largely absent
Some discussion drifts into plot retelling without explicit thematic linkage
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay demonstrates adequate to good research and analysis with partially supported conclusions, situating it in the 4â6 band. While there are moments of strong critical insight, inconsistencies in commentary and a restative conclusion limit the work from the higher 7â9 band. A score of 5 balances these strengths and weaknesses.

strengths: Clear overall structure with all required sections present
Readable formatting, consistent font and margins, and correct page numbering
In-text citations and table of contents enhance navigability
weaknesses: Inconsistent indentation in the reference list and table of contents
Block quotations and long URLs are not uniformly formatted
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation meets core IB requirements and is generally well structured and formatted (3â4 band). Minor inconsistencies in indentation and quotation formatting prevent a top-band score. A score of 3 accurately reflects a competent, but not flawless, presentation.

strandSelections.reasoning: A wide range of primary (Shakespeare, Winterson) and secondary, largely peer-reviewed, sources is integrated, indicating an informed selection process. However, the essay still lacks an explicit methodology section: there is no direct rationale for source choice, nor a clear description of analytical procedures beyond implicit close-reading and comparative techniques. The implied method is generally appropriate and mostly complete, but the absence of explicit justification limits transparency and inhibits a fuller demonstration of methodological rigour, situating the work in the upper end of the 3-4 band.

The essay employs a readable font, appropriate margins, and generally accurate in-text citations. A word count and personal code are supplied, and pages appear numbered. Yet there are formatting inconsistencies: hanging indents in the reference list are uneven, some long URLs run over lines without breaks, and block quotations are not always set off uniformly. These minor but noticeable issues keep the submission in the 3-4 band rather than securing top marks.

The bibliography demonstrates breadth and relevance: peer-reviewed articles, critical monographs, and primary texts are all present and clearly germane to the research question. Source material is generally current and diverse, covering trauma studies, queer theory, and narratology. While some evidence is paraphrased rather than critically interrogated, the majority is aptly selected to illuminate the comparative exploration, reflecting goodâthough not yet consistently exemplaryâresearch quality.

The studentâs title and opening paragraphs convey a precise, purposeful investigation into Wintersonâs intertextual reframing of Shakespeareâs play. The three key conceptsâforgiveness, time, and identityâare clearly foregrounded, and the essay maintains these foci across all major sections. Transitions and section headings (âNarrative Structure & Forgivenessâ, âRole of âTimeâ in Identity Formationâ) signpost the argument effectively, ensuring that the reader can follow the line of inquiry without ambiguity. Minor instances of repetition or slight digressions into plot summary do not seriously obscure the central topic, so overall clarity and focus remain consistently strong.

The discussion is coherent and generally well developed, moving section-by-section through the guiding themes and returning to the research question in the conclusion. The student does attempt evaluationâespecially when weighing Wintersonâs additions against Shakespeareâs originalâbut synthesis of counter-arguments remains intermittent, and the conclusion leans toward restatement rather than critical weighing of findings. The essay thus demonstrates competent, occasionally insightful evaluation without the sustained critical rigour expected for the highest band.

Close readings of imagery (feather vs. moon, tiger simile, polysyndeton) and structural parallels (intervals vs. acts) demonstrate thoughtful analysis that generally moves beyond description to interpretation. Connections between trauma theory, queer subtext, and narrative time deepen the argument. Nevertheless, commentary sometimes lags after extended quotations, and certain claims (e.g., on postmodern contingency) are asserted rather than fully evidenced. These issues limit the consistency of analytical sharpness, positioning the work solidly withinâbut not at the top ofâthe 7-9 range.

All mandatory structural components (title page, abstract substitute, contents, introduction, body sections, references) are present and logically ordered, satisfying core IB requirements. However, minor issues persist: inconsistent table-of-contents indentation, occasional mis-numbered pages in the excerpt, and the absence of explicitly demarcated sub-sections for methodology or reflection. These lapses prevent a fully seamless, professional structure, warranting a mid-band score.

The essay exhibits substantial knowledge of both Shakespeareâs *The Winterâs Tale* and Wintersonâs *The Gap of Time*, weaving detailed textual evidence with scholarly commentary. Citations span recent journal articles, monographs, and dissertations, and are generally well integrated to support claims (e.g., trauma theory, queer readings, narrative structure). Minor over-summary and occasional over-long quotations prevent the analysis from reaching seamless synthesis throughout, yet the student consistently shows coherent understanding and effectiveâif slightly unevenâdeployment of sources.

Subject-specific terminologyâintertextuality, analepsis, polysyndeton, free indirect discourse, pastoral/feminine timeâis used accurately and woven naturally into the prose. Occasional mechanical slips (e.g., âitâs passageâ) and sporadic moments where terms are invoked without full elaboration show room for refinement, but overall usage is precise, consistent, and aids analytical clarity, justifying a strong score in the 5â6 band.

The research question is explicitly stated on the title page and reiterated in the introduction. Throughout the body, each thematic section (forgiveness, time, identity) is explicitly related back to the guiding question, demonstrating a purposeful connection between evidence and line of inquiry. Occasional detours into detailed plot retelling and some tangential theoretical remarks mean the focus is not unfailingly tight; nevertheless, the question remains the clear anchor for discussion and structuring choices, meriting a strong placement in the top band, albeit not at the very highest mark.

annotations.comment: The detailed linkage of trauma layers to identity showcases deep critical insight and effective integration of scholarly and textual evidence.
The âqueer turnâ paragraph presents vivid detail but lacks deeper unpacking of its narrative impact; consider elaborating on its theoretical significance.
This paragraph is overly long and covers multiple ideas; dividing it into smaller sections would improve readability and structural clarity.
This densely written discussion would benefit from shorter paragraphs to improve readability and clearer structural pacing.
Haptic imagery analysis of the loversâ tactile connection is nuanced and illustrates a strong ability to unpack sensory detail for thematic insight.
The conclusion predominantly summarizes prior points; integrating discussion of limitations or implications would elevate its critical synthesis.
The introduction opens with general reflections on time but would benefit from a more direct connection to the stated research question to reinforce focus from the outset.
The title effectively communicates the investigationâs focus on intertextuality and key themes, establishing clear purpose and guiding the reader through the essayâs scope.
The research question is clearly stated and sharply focused, providing a strong anchor that connects every section back to the central inquiry.
Analysis occasionally drifts into plot retelling; deepen your interpretation by explicitly linking each example back to the research questionâs thematic focus.
Insightful connection of the BabyHatch as a narrative fulcrum illustrates sophisticated intertextual analysis and reinforces your argument on thematic convergence.
Including a Table of Contents enhances navigability and reflects thoughtful structure, enabling the reader to locate each section efficiently.
Indentation of entries and alignment of page numbers in the Table of Contents are inconsistent, hindering readability and professional presentation.
This paragraph relies heavily on summary of Shakespeareâs context; consider condensing descriptive background and integrating more critical analysis of your sources.
Effective use of the term âanalepsisâ and precise narrative structure terminology demonstrates accurate subject-specific vocabulary and deep conceptual understanding.
The simile comparing forgiveness to a âtigerâ is persuasively unpacked, showing strong analytical depth and a clear interpretation of thematic symbolism.
Several extended quotations run without sufficient student commentary; shorten quotes and paraphrase more to sustain your own analytical voice.
The extended metaphor of the moon is deftly analyzed, illustrating sophisticated thematic interplay between detachment and reconciliation.
The link between your analysis of jealousy and the guiding research question could be more explicit to strengthen coherence and argumentative focus.
Perceptive comparison between Wintersonâs and Shakespeareâs use of negation highlights thematic continuity and demonstrates nuanced critical engagement.
The phrase âautistic twinâ is invoked without explanation; define its conceptual role and clarify how it supports your argument.
In-text citations for Shakespeareâs dialogue lack consistent formatting; ensure quotation citations follow a uniform style throughout.
The essay lacks an evaluative reflection section; consider adding analytical commentary on your decision-making and research process to demonstrate metacognitive engagement.
Heading levels in the conclusion section are inconsistent with earlier sections; apply a uniform heading hierarchy for professional presentation.
The bibliography demonstrates breadth and currency, drawing on primary texts, peer-reviewed articles, and recent scholarship that is highly relevant to the research question.
Precise analysis of the polysyndetic structure demonstrates strong command of narrative techniques and deepens your intertextual argument.
The comparison between lunar imagery in both texts provides a compelling intertextual link that enriches and unifies your analysis.
Intertextual allusions to âsleeping beautyâ and knight effigies effectively deepen thematic resonance and demonstrate versatile use of cultural references.
Consider engaging with potential counter-arguments to the idealized portrayal of young love to strengthen evaluative balance and critical depth.
References show uneven hanging indents and inconsistent URL breaks; standardize reference formatting according to IB style guidelines.
Continue the reference listâs formatting consistently on this page: ensure access dates, URLs, and hanging indents match the style used earlier for coherence.
